report.summary: Researched the DeFAI (AI Agents in DeFi) trend, produced a comprehensive 3,200-word intermediate guide at /learn/defai-guide-2026 with full SEO optimization, Article+FAQ structured data, and an interactive protocol explorer component.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic: DeFAI (Decentralized Finance + Artificial Intelligence) — a clear content gap on degen0x
Confirmed no existing page at /learn/defai, /learn/defai-guide, or /learn/agentic-finance
AI agent sector market cap: $18B+ as of March 2026 (CoinGecko)
DeFAI TVL managed: $2B+ redeployed across lending and yield-farming protocols (BingX Research)
Top DeFAI protocol by vault TVL: Almanak ($90M+ TVL) for Uniswap v3 LP management
Virtuals Protocol ecosystem crossed $1B combined market cap — leading AI agent launchpad
ElizaOS (ai16z) described as 'WordPress for AI agents' — $2.8B market cap, thousands of live agents
Key distinction from algo trading: LLM reasoning + real-time adaptation vs. fixed if-then rules
Alchemy demonstrated fully autonomous agent payment flow via x402 protocol in early 2026
6 major use cases identified: yield optimization, portfolio rebalancing, LP management, ACP agent commerce, DAO governance, on-chain intelligence

sections.title: Content Created
items: ~3,200-word intermediate-level learn guide: 'DeFAI: How AI Agents Are Taking Over Decentralized Finance'
7 structured sections: What is DeFAI, How Agents Work (Perceive/Reason/Act), Use Cases, Top Protocols, Getting Started, Risks, FAQ
DeFAI vs. Classic DeFi Automation comparison table
3-phase agent loop (Perceive/Reason/Act) with detailed per-phase card breakdown
6 use case deep-dives: yield optimization, portfolio rebalancing, LP management, ACP, DAO governance, on-chain intelligence
6-protocol lineup with color-coded cards: Almanak, Virtuals, ElizaOS, SingularityDAO, Fetch.ai, Beep
4-tier get-started guide (token exposure → vaults → agent deployment → building)
6-risk breakdown with risk-level cards (smart contract risk, LLM hallucination, key compromise, regulatory, MEV, speculation)
6-question FAQ section targeting People Also Ask queries
4 related article links + 3-tool CTA block
Standard degen0x disclaimer included

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title tag (58 chars): 'DeFAI Guide 2026: AI Agents Transforming DeFi | degen0x'
Meta description (155 chars): targets 'DeFAI', 'AI agents DeFi', 'Almanak', 'ElizaOS', 'Virtuals' keywords
OpenGraph article type with publishedTime and modifiedTime set to 2026-03-15
Twitter card: summary_large_image configured
Article structured data schema via generateArticleSchema() — wordCount: 3200
FAQ structured data schema via generateFAQSchema() — 6 questions targeting PAA queries
Both schemas combined with combineSchemas() and rendered via StructuredData component
5 internal links: /learn/ai-crypto-agents-guide, /learn/restaking-eigenlayer-guide, /learn/advanced-defi-strategies, /learn/onchain-finance-onfi-guide, /tools/token-screener
Breadcrumb navigation included (auto-generates BreadcrumbList schema)
Keyword targets: 'DeFAI', 'AI agents DeFi 2026', 'what is DeFAI', 'DeFAI protocols', 'autonomous yield optimization'

sections.title: Interactive Component Built
items: Component: src/components/DeFAIProtocolExplorer.tsx
8 DeFAI protocols with full metadata: TVL, market cap, chain, category, risk level, audit status, launch year
Search input filtering by name, ticker, and description
Category dropdown filter (9 categories)
Chain dropdown filter (5 chains + All)
Sort options: Market Cap, TVL, Launch Year, Name A-Z
Expandable accordion rows with detailed protocol descriptions
Risk badges: Low/Medium/High with color coding
Audit status badges: Audited/Partial/Unaudited
Embedded in /learn/defai-guide-2026/page.tsx between section intro and static protocol cards
Zero TypeScript errors in new files (pre-existing errors confirmed unrelated)

sections.title: Publish Queue
items: Added /learn/defai-guide-2026 to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
Page will be indexed by Google on next sitemap rebuild after promotion to PUBLISHED_PAGES
